A massive solar flare is increasing energy levels by 50% for the next cycle. Ensure all personnel take shelter to minimize radiation exposure.
A massive solar flare is impacting Mars with 150% solar activity. Increase radiation shielding protocols and limit EVA exposure during the next cycle.

daily_event.headline: Solar Activity Boosts Energy Output
daily_event.summary: Solar activity at 65% increases solar panel efficiency, enhancing energy generation across colonies.

missions.title: Optimize Solar Arrays
missions.briefing: Take advantage of elevated solar activity to recalibrate and optimize solar panels for maximum energy output.
missions.objective: Recalibrate solar arrays to increase energy collection efficiency by 10%.
missions.risk: Minimal risk of equipment malfunction during recalibration.

missions.title: Water Recycling System Check
missions.briefing: Ensure the water recycling systems are functioning at peak efficiency during the cold early spring season.
missions.objective: Inspect and repair water recycling units to prevent water loss.
missions.risk: Potential minor system downtime during maintenance.

missions.title: Material Inventory and Salvage
missions.briefing: With stable weather conditions, conduct a small-scale materials salvage operation near the colony perimeter.
missions.objective: Collect at least 20 units of usable materials from nearby debris or old structures.
missions.risk: Low risk of minor injury from handling debris.

npc_transmissions.message: Solar activity is currently favorable. Optimize energy systems to maximize output.
Requesting support for water recycling system upgrades to improve efficiency during early spring.
Sharing data on energy optimization techniques during current solar boost.

ai.news_summary: Mars colonies experience a beneficial solar boost, enhancing energy production amid early spring cold. Stable conditions allow teams to focus on optimizing solar arrays, maintaining water recycling systems, and salvaging materials. Coordination between colonies is active to maxi…
